Name: Swordfish Storage Message Registry
Description: This registry defines the event messages for Swordfish Storage devices.  This replaces the Swordfish message registry.

LowSpaceWarningThresholdTriggered.Description: Indicates that a LowSpaceWarningThreshold has been triggered.
LowSpaceWarningThresholdTriggered.LongDescription: Indicates that a LowSpaceWarningThreshold has been triggered. For some resource types, adding more capacity may resolve the low space warning. Other suggested resolutions may be provided as OEM data.
LowSpaceWarningThresholdTriggered.Message: The LowSpaceWarningThreshold `%1` has been triggered on `%2`.
ArgLongDescriptions: This argument shall contain the threshold value that has been exceeded.
This argument shall contain the Resource reporting the threshold trigger.

LowSpaceWarningThresholdCleared.Description: Indicates that a LowSpaceWarningThreshold has been cleared.
LowSpaceWarningThresholdCleared.LongDescription: Indicates that a LowSpaceWarningThreshold has been cleared.
LowSpaceWarningThresholdCleared.Message: The LowSpaceWarningThreshold `%1` has been cleared on `%2`.
ArgLongDescriptions: This argument shall contain the threshold value that has been cleared.
This argument shall contain the Resource reporting the threshold cleared.

ReservationsLostAcrossPowerCycle.Description: Indicates that persistent reservation key and holder information was lost during powercycle.
ReservationsLostAcrossPowerCycle.LongDescription: Indicates that persistent reservation key and holder information was lost during powercycle.
ReservationsLostAcrossPowerCycle.Message: Persistent reservation key and holder information was lost during powercycle.

BackgroundOperationFailed.Description: Indicates that a background operation failed.
BackgroundOperationFailed.LongDescription: Indicates that a background operation failed.
ArgDescriptions: The name of the background `Operation` that failed.
ArgLongDescriptions: This argument shall contain the name of the background task that failed, typically defined by the `Operation` property or `OperationType` enum.

BackgroundOperationSuspended.Description: Indicates that a background operation has been suspended.
BackgroundOperationSuspended.LongDescription: Indicates that a background operation has been suspended.
BackgroundOperationSuspended.Message: The background operation `%1` has been suspended.
ArgDescriptions: The name of the background `Operation` that has been suspended.
ArgLongDescriptions: This argument shall contain the name of the background task that has been suspended, typically defined by the `Operation` property or `OperationType` enum.

BackgroundOperationResumed.Description: Indicates that a background operation has resumed.
BackgroundOperationResumed.LongDescription: Indicates that a background operation has resumed.
ArgDescriptions: The name of the background `Operation` that has resumed.
ArgLongDescriptions: This argument shall contain the name of the background task that has resumed, typically defined by the `Operation` property or `OperationType` enum.

BackgroundOperationComplete.Description: Indicates that a background operation has completed.
BackgroundOperationComplete.LongDescription: Indicates that a background operation has completed.
ArgDescriptions: The name of the background `Operation` that has completed.
ArgLongDescriptions: This argument shall contain the name of the background task that has completed, typically defined by the `Operation` property or `OperationType` enum.
